completed_tasks.name: ZCQL audit and fixes across 9 function files

blockers.description: QUICKML_TOKEN wiped on every catalyst deploy
blockers.workaround: Re-add via Catalyst Console after each deploy

human_actions_pending.action: Re-add QUICKML_TOKEN in Catalyst Console → pipeline & nl_sql

decisions.decision: Inject follow-up context directly adjacent to Query line in prompt
decisions.rationale: GLM ignores context blocks in separate sections
Follow-up needs actual WHERE clauses from previous SQL

decisions.decision: Use LIKE for district name matching
decisions.rationale: Users type partial names like 'Bengaluru' instead of 'Bengaluru Urban'

next_action: Review handoff, decide next work item: page refresh test, sync-full, or dashboard features.
context_notes: Branch phase2-dashboard merged Phase 4 from main. Many uncommitted ZCQL fixes in entity resolution files from earlier work. Client-side localStorage persistence for page refresh is implemented but not browser-tested.
